constraint.description: Role-bearing tactical owners that fan out into too many foreign owners or foreign feature scopes are reported for review as architecture-sprawl candidates.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringRoleType) WHERE NOT source.fqn CONTAINS '$' AND source.roleKind IN [ 'DOMAIN_APPLICATION_SERVICE', 'DOMAIN_USE_CASE', 'DOMAIN_SERVICE', 'DOMAIN_POLICY', 'DOMAIN_FACTORY', 'VIEW_BINDER', 'VIEW_INTENT_HANDLER', 'DATA_SERVICE_CONTRIBUTION' ] CALL { WITH source MATCH (source)-[:DEPENDS_ON_PRODUCTION]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE source <> target AND NOT target.fqn CONTAINS '$' AND coalesce(target.featureScope, '') <> '' AND coalesce(source.featureScope, '') <> '' AND target.featureScope <> source.featureScope WITH target, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS targetPath ORDER BY targetPath RETURN collect(DISTINCT target) AS foreignTargets, collect(DISTINCT targetPath)[0..5] AS topTargets } CALL { WITH source OPTIONAL MATCH (dependent:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType)-[:DEPENDS_ON_PRODUCTION]->(source) WHERE dependent <> source AND NOT dependent.fqn CONTAINS '$' RETURN count(DISTINCT dependent) AS incomingDependentCount } WITH source, foreignTargets, topTargets, incomingDependentCount WHERE size(foreignTargets) > 0 UNWIND foreignTargets AS foreignTarget WITH source, topTargets, incomingDependentCount, size(foreignTargets) AS foreignOwnerCount, collect(DISTINCT coalesce(foreignTarget.featureScope, 'unscoped')) AS foreignFeatureScopes WITH source, topTargets, incomingDependentCount, foreignOwnerCount, size(foreignFeatureScopes) AS foreignFeatureScopeCount WHERE ( coalesce(source.thinRole, false) = true AND (foreignOwnerCount >= 6 OR foreignFeatureScopeCount >= 3) ) OR ( coalesce(source.thinRole, false) = false AND (foreignOwnerCount >= 4 OR foreignFeatureScopeCount >= 2) ) RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, source.roleKind AS Role, coalesce(source.featureScope, 'unscoped') AS FeatureScope, foreignOwnerCount AS ForeignOwnerCount, foreignFeatureScopeCount AS ForeignFeatureScopeCount, incomingDependentCount AS IncomingDependentCount, reduce(targetText = '', targetPath IN topTargets | CASE WHEN targetText = '' THEN targetPath ELSE targetText + ', ' + targetPath END ) AS TopTargets, 'review whether this tactical role has become a hub that coordinates too many foreign owners or foreign feature scopes' AS ExpectedReview, source.fqn + ' fans out into ' + toString(foreignOwnerCount) + ' foreign owners across ' + toString(foreignFeatureScopeCount) + ' foreign feature scopes' AS ActualReview, 'Split the role, collapse pass-through coordination, or move ownership downward until the tactical boundary stops acting as a hub.' AS Details ORDER BY ForeignFeatureScopeCount DESC, ForeignOwnerCount DESC, Source

constraint.description: Domain and data feature scopes that couple too broadly across foreign feature scopes are reported for review even when no dependency cycle exists.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType)-[:DEPENDS_ON_PRODUCTION]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE source.layerRootKind IN ['domain', 'data'] AND target.layerRootKind IN ['domain', 'data'] AND NOT source.fqn CONTAINS '$' AND NOT target.fqn CONTAINS '$' AND coalesce(source.featureScope, '') <> '' AND coalesce(target.featureScope, '') <> '' AND source.featureScope <> target.featureScope WITH source.featureScope AS featureScope, target.featureScope AS foreignFeatureScope, count(DISTINCT source.fqn + '->' + target.fqn) AS dependencyCount ORDER BY featureScope, dependencyCount DESC, foreignFeatureScope WITH featureScope, collect({ foreignFeatureScope: foreignFeatureScope, dependencyCount: dependencyCount }) AS foreignScopeDependencies, count(DISTINCT foreignFeatureScope) AS foreignFeatureScopeCount, sum(dependencyCount) AS crossFeatureDependencyCount WHERE foreignFeatureScopeCount >= 4 OR crossFeatureDependencyCount >= 12 RETURN featureScope AS FeatureScope, foreignFeatureScopeCount AS ForeignFeatureScopeCount, crossFeatureDependencyCount AS CrossFeatureDependencyCount, reduce(scopeText = '', item IN foreignScopeDependencies[0..5] | CASE WHEN scopeText = '' THEN item.foreignFeatureScope + ' (' + toString(item.dependencyCount) + ')' ELSE scopeText + ', ' + item.foreignFeatureScope + ' (' + toString(item.dependencyCount) + ')' END ) AS TopForeignScopes, 'review whether this feature scope is too broadly coupled even though the graph may still be acyclic' AS ExpectedReview, featureScope + ' depends on ' + toString(foreignFeatureScopeCount) + ' foreign feature scopes through ' + toString(crossFeatureDependencyCount) + ' cross-feature production dependencies' AS ActualReview, 'Extract a narrower seam, split the feature, or move mixed concerns so one feature scope stops coordinating this much foreign structure.' AS Details ORDER BY CrossFeatureDependencyCount DESC, ForeignFeatureScopeCount DESC, FeatureScope

constraint.description: Over-wide public backend and runtime registration roots are reported when their callable surface or collaborator breadth grows beyond a focused review threshold.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringRoleType) WHERE NOT source.fqn CONTAINS '$' AND source.visibility = 'public' AND source.roleKind IN ['DOMAIN_APPLICATION_SERVICE', 'DATA_SERVICE_CONTRIBUTION'] CALL { WITH source OPTIONAL MATCH (source)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method:SaltMarcher:LayeringRoleMethod) WHERE method.visibility = 'public' RETURN count(DISTINCT method) AS publicMethodCount } CALL { WITH source MATCH (source)-[:DEPENDS_ON_PRODUCTION]->(collaborator:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringProductionType) WHERE source <> collaborator AND NOT collaborator.fqn CONTAINS '$' WITH coalesce(collaborator.relativePath, collaborator.fqn) AS collaboratorPath ORDER BY collaboratorPath RETURN count(DISTINCT collaboratorPath) AS collaboratorCount, collect(DISTINCT collaboratorPath)[0..8] AS collaborators } WITH source, publicMethodCount, collaboratorCount, collaborators WHERE ( source.roleKind = 'DOMAIN_APPLICATION_SERVICE' AND (publicMethodCount >= 10 OR collaboratorCount >= 6) ) OR ( source.roleKind = 'DATA_SERVICE_CONTRIBUTION' AND collaboratorCount >= 8 ) RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, source.roleKind AS Role, publicMethodCount AS PublicMethodCount, collaboratorCount AS CollaboratorCount, reduce(collaboratorText = '', collaboratorPath IN collaborators | CASE WHEN collaboratorText = '' THEN collaboratorPath ELSE collaboratorText + ', ' + collaboratorPath END ) AS Collaborators, 'review whether this public boundary root still presents one narrow responsibility' AS ExpectedReview, source.fqn + ' exposes ' + toString(publicMethodCount) + ' public methods and depends on ' + toString(collaboratorCount) + ' production collaborators' AS ActualReview, 'Split the public boundary, push orchestration below the root, or trim collaborators until the entry surface stops acting as a broad coordination shell.' AS Details ORDER BY CollaboratorCount DESC, PublicMethodCount DESC, Source
